title: Rannd Delckis
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] [[Communications officer/Legends|communications officer]] from [[Star Wars Legends]]|the [[canon]] [[Grand Moff]] [[Randd]]|linebreak=1}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:RanndDelckis.jpg]] |name=Rannd Delckis |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],According to ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'', the [[Battle of Bakura]] occurred shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. ''[[Flurry]]''''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Virgillian]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blond]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] *[[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] **[[Virgillian Free Alignment Starfleet]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Code a message to Admiral Ackbar, Delckis. We need more ships. Include BAC recordings for that battle. They'll show him what we're up against. Can you have it off in half an hour?''"
"''Easily, sir.|Luke Skywalker and Rannd Delckis|''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''}} '''Rannd Delckis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] who served aboard the [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class bulk cruiser]] ''[[Flurry]]'' as [[Communications officer/Legends|communications officer]] during the latter stages of the [[Virgillian Civil War]], and later went into the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was killed on board the ''Flurry'' during the [[Battle of Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. ==Biography== ===Noble beginnings=== Rannd Delckis was born into a [[Noble/Legends|noble]] family; his [[Parent/Legends|parents]] were part of the autocratic government of the [[Virgillia system/Legends|Virgillia system]], the [[Aristocracy]], which was embroiled in the [[Virgillian Civil War]] against the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]]. As the Aristocracy was allied with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he grew up with the privileges of being an Imperial citizen. While attending the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], he earned a reputation as "up-and-coming officer material" and graduated in the top third of his class. After graduation, he was commissioned to the rank of [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Delckis embarked on his first assignment shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' as a junior [[Communications officer/Legends|communications assistant]] aboard the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Stormwind]]'', which was part of the small Imperial [[Fleet/Legends|armada]] stationed in the [[Virgillia system/Legends|Virgillia system]]. The ''Stormwind'' patrolled the system for Free Alignment activity, as well as for the presence of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]],{{CSWECite|II|141|Jarroth, Captain}} which had become an ally of the Free Alignment, supplying them with [[Blaster/Legends|arms]] and [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. When the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jarroth]], received word from one of the Imperial spies in the [[Star system|system]] that there was a suspected Free Alignment camp on [[Virgillia's forested moon]], Delckis was assigned to the landing party charged with investigating this claim. Upon finding the [[Unidentified refugee camp|encampment]], it became clear that the inhabitants were [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]], including many women and children. Despite this, Captain Jarroth was convinced the camp was sheltering Free Alignment fighters, and authorized [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to use [[The Burning/Legends|torture]] to extract intel from the refugees. This was unsuccessful in gaining any intelligence, but was successful in [[Death/Legends|killing]] multiple refugees. When the refugees tried to fight back, the stormtroopers slaughtered the entire camp. ===Revelations and realizations=== [[File:Flurryandx-wing.png|thumb|right|300px|Delckis served most of his time with the Free Alignment on the ''Flurry''.]] Witnessing this was a watershed moment for Delckis, who began to reconsider his perception of the Aristocracy and the Empire. Rumours that he had previously dismissed, thinking them ridiculous, became far more plausible in light of the cruelty he had seen with his own eyes. He realized it was possible that the Empire ''had'' actually destroyed entire [[Planet/Legends|planets]] with [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]] and put down revolts with [[Poison gas/Legends|poison gas]], and that it was the Aristocracy that had forced the refugees to flee to such a miserable camp in the first place. Troubled by the idea of working to enforce a regime that had such disregard for sentient life, he defected to the Free Alignment shortly after the attack. Delckis was the only member of the nobility to ever defect, so the Free Alignment initially met him with hostility and distrust, believing him a double agent. He soon proved himself to Captain [[Tessa Manchisco]], who came to value him so highly that she requested that Delckis be assigned to her ship when she was given command of the [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class bulk cruiser]] ''[[Flurry]]''. The ''Flurry'' was one of eight [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruisers]] donated to the [[Virgillian Free Alignment Starfleet]] in the last few weeks of the war, and was the ship Delckis spent most of his service on during his time with the Free Alignment. He gained the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and received two commendations for his excellence with communications systems and sensors, greatly assisting the war effort by using his Imperial training against the Empire that had taught him. The Free Alignment eventually won the Virgillian Civil War, and shortly afterwards the new Virgillian [[Virgillian Council|government]] sent a task force to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in fighting in the Battle of Endor. He remained aboard the ''Flurry'' during the battle and went on to serve during the [[Bakura Incident]] under the command of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], in which the Rebel Alliance sent ships to the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]] in response to a plea for aid from the Imperial government on the planet [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], which was facing an extra-galactic invasion from the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]]. Despite the established [[Bakura Truce|truce]] between the Imperials and Rebel Alliance in the face of their common enemy, he was killed with the rest of the ''Flurry''{{'s}} crew when the ship was destroyed by the Imperial [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Dominant]]'' during the [[Battle of Bakura]] in 4 ABY. He was posthumously decorated by the Alliance for his sacrifice.''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Sir, drink of water?''"
"''Thanks.|Rannd Delckis and Luke Skywalker|}} Rannd Delckis was a tall [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] with a muscular build and [[Color/Legends|blond]] hair cropped short in the fashion popular with Imperial officers at the time. He had the air of a professional, and did not allow his relative lack of combat experience to hinder his excellence as an officer. ==Skills and abilities== {{Quote|We're done, for now. Get the outer-system scanners up, Delckis. It's my guess they're not going far.''"
"''Yes, sir.''"
[time passes]
"''Sir, you were right. They're already coming up, barely outsystem.|Luke Skywalker and Rannd Delckis|}} Delckis was a talented communications officer, intimately familiar with the communications technology used by the Empire and skilled at modifying and manipulating it to achieve functions it was not designed for. His ability was used to great effect by the Free Alignment to fool and confuse Imperial and Alignment systems. He was also fluent in multiple languages and knowledgeable about [[Alien/Legends|alien]] species. ==Equipment== Delckis carried a [[DL-18 Blaster Pistol]] and wore a cream-colored''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' establishes that [[Tessa Manchisco]] wore a [[Color/Legends|cream]]-colored uniform and ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' establishes that Manchisco and Delckis wore the same uniform. Free Alignment uniform. ==Appearances== *''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}} *{{WEGCite|story=Newest Rebels|book=The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook}} ==Sources== *''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Delckis |es=Rannd Delckis }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Delckis, Rannd}} [[Category:Alliance Army officers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial defectors]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Virgillian Free Alignment members]]
